mapper.select: SELECT A.PRO_ID, A.PRO_SEQ, COALESCE(A.REQ_ID, '') AS REQ_ID, A.REQ_ESNTL_ID, A.ADV_ESNTL_ID, COALESCE(DECRYPT(U.USER_NM), '') AS ADV_ESNTL_NM, COALESCE(FN_MASK_PHONE(DECRYPT(U.MBTLNUM), 'N'), '') AS MBTLNUM, COALESCE(U.PROFILE_DESC, '') AS PROFILE_DESC, DATE_FORMAT(A.ADV_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS ADV_DT, A.ADV_FROM, A.ADV_TO, COALESCE(A.ADV_SPACE, '') AS ADV_SPACE, COALESCE(A.ADV_DESC, '') AS ADV_DESC, COALESCE(A.FILE_ID, '') AS FILE_ID, COALESCE(A.CHG_USER_ID, '') AS CHG_USER_ID, A.CRT_DATE, A.CHG_DATE FROM ARTADVI A LEFT JOIN ARMUSER U ON U.ESNTL_ID = A.ADV_ESNTL_ID WHERE A.REQ_ID = #{reqId} ORDER BY A.ADV_DT, A.ADV_FROM
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ARTADVI ( REQ_ID, PRO_ID, PRO_SEQ, REQ_ESNTL_ID, ADV_ESNTL_ID, STTUS_CODE, CHG_USER_ID, CRT_DATE, CHG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{reqId}, #{proId}, #{proSeq}, #{reqEsntlId}, #{advEsntlId}, '', #{chgUserId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ARTADVI SET ADV_ESNTL_ID = #{advEsntlId}, ADV_DT = #{advDt}, ADV_FROM = #{advFrom}, ADV_TO = #{advTo}, ADV_SPACE = #{advSpace}, ADV_DESC = #{advDesc}, FILE_ID = #{fileId}, CHG_USER_ID = #{chgUserId}, CHG_DATE = NOW() WHERE REQ_ID = #{reqId}
